initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED has 100 dollars and is offering to give me 10 dollars. I currently have 0 dollars. Accepting this trade would give me 10 dollars. Since this is the first move, it's reasonable to accept a small amount of money. Rejecting would result in both of us losing everything.

```

<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering 10 dollars. I currently have 0. Accepting is a good first move to gain some resources. Rejecting loses everything. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your offer! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
